parents.subject: LU-18155 obd: remove duplicate SLAB and PAGE poisoning

commit.subject: LU-18212 ioctl: fix incorrect LASSERT() in osd_get_info()
commit.message:
LU-18212 ioctl: fix incorrect LASSERT() in osd_get_info()

The = assignment in the LASSERT() should be == instead.

However, it is better not to LASSERT() on data that may come
from userspace, so just return an error if value is too small.

CoverityID: 445224 ("Incorrect expression")
CoverityID: 445223 ("Control flow issues")

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 928f040 ("LU-18212 ioctl: LL_IOC_FID2MDTIDX on server mount point")
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I4e2f915e9cf382c349bb1a81030913a2d3dbc8d5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56585
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Rahul Bansal <rahulmay94@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
